description:
Long ago, the Three Sages imbued this world with magic and sealed away an evil deity.
Many years have passed since then, and with the seal slowly losing its power, the world stands on the verge of a new age of chaos.
People driven from their homes by monsters traveled by carriage to a village said to be protected by one of the Three Sages, "Aleister the Invoker."
Among them rode a young man who had joined the journey, having heard the rumors.
Source: Official English Website

titles.title: マギストスI「召喚師アレイスター」
